room.caption: [60] Excellent for those who find it early.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(60)
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backMeadeland1 backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollow.yMoveScale=1 backFollow.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh1MainA) sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh1SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(1) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sPitfallSign stringToShow="Even secret places have death pits!" signSize=1
